title: Arrows of Dawn

sections.label: Lyrics
lines: Hear my cry in darkness, Lord
As enemies sharpen every word
Like arrows aimed to tear apart
The innocent and faithful heart
In shadows deep, they plot and scheme
Their traps more deadly than they seem
But You will rise, Your arrows fly
Swift justice from the morning sky
Their own tongues cause their fall from grace
While all Your people see Your face
From secret places they conspire
Their words like venom born of fire
"Who will see?" they boldly claim
As they devise their plans of shame
But in their pride, they fail to see
The God who watches patiently
But You will rise, Your arrows fly
Swift justice from the morning sky
Their own tongues cause their fall from grace
While all Your people see Your face
Their clever schemes will be their snare
Their confidence turns to despair
For You will strike with perfect aim
And all who see will speak Your name
The righteous find their joy in You
As wisdom proves Your ways are true
But You will rise, Your arrows fly
Swift justice from the morning sky
Their own tongues cause their fall from grace
While all Your people see Your face
In awe they stand Your mighty hand
Has shown them all Pride's deadly fall
While those who trust Find shelter just
In You alone Our cornerstone
So let the faithful take their rest
In You, our shield, in You we're blessed
For though the wicked plot by night
You are our guardian, our light
And all the earth will come to see
Your justice and Your majesty
But You will rise, Your arrows fly
Swift justice from the morning sky
Their own tongues cause their fall from grace
While all Your people see Your face

epigraph: and bend their bows to shoot their arrows
